nodes.label: Saathi Hero Image: Daughter Guiding Elderly Father Through Phone (rationale: hero/marketing asset depicting an adult daughter in a teal kurta warmly showing a smartphone screen to her elderly father, seated together in a softly lit, homely living room with vintage furniture, family photos, and a table lamp; a pill organizer, medicine bottle, notebook, and coffee cup sit on the table between them, signaling medication management and daily care routines; composition uses warm earth tones, shallow depth of field, and intimate framing to convey trust, dignity, and tech-assisted caregiving for elderly parents — likely used as an onboarding/landing hero for the Saathi app to visually establish its value proposition of bridging family care with technology)
